subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance! Thy letter was the trace of the pen of faith and certitude. Open thy tongue in thanksgiving, for thou hast been raised from the depths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی نامه اثر خامه ایمان و ایقان بود زبان بشکرانه گشا که از حیز
